title: Euceron
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{MultipleIssues|citation|image}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Euceron |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' and its [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] define [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] as the portion of the galaxy between and including the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] and [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]. |sector=[[Eucer sector/Legends|Eucer sector]] |system=[[Euceron system/Legends|Euceron system]] |coordinates=Q-7 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Great Dordon Caves]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Euceron (species)|Euceron]] |otherspecies=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=[[Eusebus]] {{C|capital}} |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[Ruling Power]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] }} {{Quote|I knew it would be crowded on Euceron, but I didn't expect this. At least on Coruscant the traffic is strictly controlled. This is a mess.''"
"''Euceron isn't used to such traffic. Beings come from all over the galaxy to the Galactic Games.|Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi|''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]''}} '''Euceron''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Eucer sector/Legends|Eucer sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was located near [[Anzat/Legends|Anzat]]. ==History== ===Galactic Games=== {{Quote|Euceron is trying its best to keep things under control. The leaders of the Ruling Power don't want anything to go wrong. They are trying to gain more power in the Senate, to be put on some very important committees. This is a crucial way to show that their planet is stable.|Obi-Wan Kenobi, to Anakin Skywalker|}} Euceron was known for its smugglers and illegal activities. The planet hosted the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] of [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]], in its capital city [[Eusebus]]. Its [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] people were also called [[Euceron (species)|Euceron]]. The government in charge of Euceron was called the [[Ruling Power]], a body that felt underrepresented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate.]] They used the Galactic Games awarded them as a means to prove their stability, gain more power in the Senate, and secure positions on certain important committees. It was during these pre-[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] Games of 26 BBY that 14-year-old [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] won the freedom of [[Djulla Tyerell]] (sister of [[Deland Tyerell/Legends|Deland]] and [[Doby Tyerell]], but a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] to the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]], father of [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] [[Hekula]]) by winning a celebrated though illegal [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]] in which the further illegalities of rigging and sabotage were made by high-profile members of the [[Games Council|Council of the Games]]. The former five-game champion of the [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] Games, a local Euceronian athlete and Games Council member by the name of [[Maxo Vista]], was later exposed and summoned before the Ruling Power for conspiring to rig the race, which was held in the [[Great Dordon Caves]]. Moreover, had the sabotage attempts of both Vista and Games Council head [[Liviani Sarno]] been fully successful, the podrace would have ended in untold spectator deaths. Sarno and Vista, notwithstanding their complicity, were ultimately released from custody, however, when the Jedi failed to produce any key witnesses—one of whom ([[Bog Divinian]]) refused to testify against him, while the others were either dead (murdered "timing judge" [[Aarno Dering]]) or had fled the planet (information brokers [[Fligh]] and [[Didi Oddo]]). ===Clone Wars=== {{Quote|Given your past, a mission to Anzat would be ''unwise,'' Quinlan. I'm on ''Euceron,'' closer at the moment. I'll go. You need to rest…|Tholme, to Quinlan Vos|[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]]}} During the Clone Wars, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] was dispatched by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] to mediate a dispute on Euceron.{{CSWECite|I|242|Euceron}} {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{1st}} *[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]] {{Mo}} *''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Euceron}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *{{InsiderCite|128|Ask Lobot}} *{{DB|character|truveld|Veld, Tru}} *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' *{{SW|url=news/this-is-podracing-sports-in-the-star-wars-galaxy-part-1|series=Sports in the Star Wars Galaxy|text=Part 1: This Is Podracing|nolive=1}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Euceron |es=Euceron }} [[Category:Eucer sector locations]] [[Category:Galactic Republic planets]] [[Category:Locations along the Perlemian Trade Route]] [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]]
